default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aftershoot and GrowthX to discuss content production progress, performance, and feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production pace: \~4-5 blog posts/week, with 4 ready for publishing this week and 8 outlines pending review](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Blog style guide draft created; team to review and finalize](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Performance update: At least 3 published posts cracking top 10 avg position; all getting good traction](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Key areas for improvement: SERP intent alignment, formatting for readability, reducing redundancy, adopting more conversational tone](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [Current pace: \~4-5 blog posts/week](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [4 posts ready for publishing this week](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [8 outlines pending review](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [David to edit "canon" post tonight/tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Manaswini to review 8 outlines within 3 working days](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Team agrees this is a good tempo, considering detailed nature of posts](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

### Blog Style Guide

  - [David created draft based on past 2-3 months of discussions](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Incorporates Manaswini's comments and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Team to review, discuss, and finalize for consistent editing/writing](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

### Performance Update

  - [At least 3 published posts cracking top 10 average position](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [LUTs post (first one) performing well](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [All posts getting impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [David to provide consolidated update with tracing later](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Weekly performance highlights to be added to future meeting agendas](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)

### Keyword Research and Competitor Analysis

  - [Team to conduct more keyword research next week](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Create spreadsheet with: keyword, volume, competitor URL](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Add competitive sites to sub-sheet for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Separate spreadsheet (not in OS) for easier collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)

### Content Feedback and Improvements

  - [Articles comprehensive but need better SERP intent alignment](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Focus on unique perspectives/value-add sections](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Improve formatting: Use bullet lists, tables, images, infographics](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Reduce redundancy and repetition](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Adopt more conversational tone, avoid "preaching"](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Review brand guidelines and writing guidelines for alignment](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Add photographer insights at outline stage](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David: Edit "canon" post, continue writing based on approved outlines](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [David: Create consolidated performance update with tracing](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [David: Conduct additional keyword research, create spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Manaswini/Monalisa: Review 8 outlines within 3 working days](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [All: Review blog style guide draft, provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [David: Incorporate feedback into workflow, focus on style improvements](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Monalisa: Follow up with Rashid about programmatic project for engagement photoshoot locations](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Team: Implement more detailed outline process, including photographer insights](https://fathom.video/share/CmoCo8ZTQQyqWzjN83YRw5mhXD_VDx7H?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

action_items.description: Edit Canon article, publish 4 articles this week
Review 8 outlines w/ Monalisa, provide feedback within 3 working days
Review 8 outlines w/ Manaswini, provide feedback within 3 working days
Review blog style guide draft, discuss w/ Monalisa, provide feedback to David
Review blog style guide draft, discuss w/ Manaswini, provide feedback to David
Prepare consolidated performance update on published blog posts, share w/ team
Follow up w/ Rashid re: engagement photoshoot locations programmatic project
Create spreadsheet w/ keyword research, competitor info, share w/ Aftershoot team
Incorporate feedback on SERP intent, formatting, tone in future articles per Manaswini's comments
